name: Economist Intelligence: EIU
description: The company specializes in providing market intelligence through comprehensive country and industry analysis, strategic operations, and custom research. Their services, which include forecasting and market sizing, equip organizations with high-quality data and insights essential for understanding political and economic developments that impact businesses and markets globally.

name: Euromonitor International
description: Euromonitor International specializes in market intelligence, offering a comprehensive syndicated market research database that provides detailed data and analysis on industries and consumers across 1,200 cities and 210 countries. Their approach combines data science and on-the-ground research to help clients understand market dynamics and identify opportunities for successful product launches.

name: Market Intelligence Data
description: Market Intelligence Data, part of the Ameliorate Solutions Group, specializes in providing comprehensive market research reports that aid in decision-making for various industries and organizations. Their offerings include global and regional market intelligence, statistical forecasts, competitive analysis, and strategic recommendations, all designed to support clients in achieving their goals.

name: NielsenIQ
description: NIQ provides comprehensive insights into consumer buying behavior, essential for understanding market dynamics and identifying growth opportunities. With a century of experience, they emphasize the importance of turning complex data into actionable insights, particularly for enhancing ecommerce performance.

name: Mintel
description: Mintel offers game-changing market intelligence solutions that provide instant answers to strategic questions, helping businesses track and analyze global product innovation. Their reliable insights into new products and market trends equip industry leaders with the knowledge to stay ahead.

name: GfK
description: GfK offers extensive market intelligence through its advanced analytics and comprehensive consumer insights, empowering brands with trusted data to drive growth. Their expertise in market and retail dynamics, enhanced by the recent merger with NIQ, positions them as a key resource for businesses seeking in-depth market knowledge and innovative strategies.

name: Dominio Consultores
description: The company is a leading Peruvian consultancy specializing in Market Intelligence, offering tactical insights that allow for market and product stock estimation, distinguishing itself from competitors' forensic reports.

name: Intelligence Node
description: The company, Intelligence Node, offers PriceIntelligence AI, a solution trusted by leading retailers worldwide for market intelligence.

name: Intelligentsia Worldwide
description: Intelligentsia Worldwide, a leader in Global Market Intelligence Consultancy, specializes in providing comprehensive market intelligence services, including competitor and customer insights. With over 30 years of expertise, the company delivers bespoke intelligence solutions that enhance strategic decision-making.

name: GlobalData
description: The company provides a comprehensive platform that integrates unique data and expert analysis, offering valuable market and competitive intelligence. Their services support various sectors, including strategic planning, innovation, and market strategy.
